excerpt: Today, GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna from OpenAI are generally available on Amazon Bedrock, bringing the smartest family of models from OpenAI yet to Amazon Bedrock’s next-generation inference engine built for high-performance, security and reliability.

title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna are now generally available on Amazon Bedrock
